title: Public support for climate policies and its ideological predictors across countries of the Global North and Global South

tax_mentions.context: Example item in the study’s “taxes” policy-instrument composite: a carbon-border tax on imports based on carbon emissions.
tax_mentions.notes: “Taxes” support analysed as a composite policy-support score across six countries.

excluded_policy_mentions.reason_it_is_not_a_carbon_or_fuel_tax: Regulation is bans/standards (regulatory proposals), not a tax on carbon or fuels.
Subsidies provide financial support, not a carbon/fuel tax instrument.
Information campaigns/disclosure requirements are non-tax measures and do not impose carbon/fuel prices.

inclusion_reason: The paper measures respondents’ support for a “taxes” instrument that includes a “carbon border tax” (carbon-emissions–based taxation) and reports acceptability plus ideological predictors across six countries.
